request.description: Change password for authenticated user. Requires current password and new password.

query.description: Max distance in km (uses member's radius if not provided)
Price filter: all, free, or paid

request.description: Get activity by ID for authenticated members. Always includes booking status (isBooked, bookingStatus, bookingId).

body.description: For paid activities, paymentMethodId is required. For free activities, paymentMethodId can be omitted.

request.description: Create a booking for an activity. For paid activities, paymentMethodId is required. Payment will be authorized and held in escrow until host approves.

query.description: Filter bookings: upcoming (confirmed with future dates), pending, past (confirmed with past dates), cancelled, or all

request.description: Get filtered bookings for the current member. Filter options: upcoming (confirmed bookings with future activity dates), pending (awaiting approval), past (confirmed bookings with past activity dates), cancelled, or all.

Member cancels their own confirmed booking. Refund policy: 48+ hours = 99% refund (1% fee), 24-48 hours = 49% refund (50% penalty + 1% fee), <24 hours = no refund. Free bookings are cancelled immediately.
Get payment history with summary statistics for the current member.
Get detailed invoice information for a specific booking.
Get booking details by ID.
Member rates and reviews a past activity. Rating must be 1-5 stars.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Morning Yoga Session",
  "description": "Join us for a rejuvenating morning yoga session in the park. All levels welcome!",
  "category": ["Wellness & Mindfulness", "Sports & Fitness"],
  "location": "Springfield Park",
  "date": "2024-12-28T00:00:00.000Z",
  "time": "08:00",
  "maxParticipants": 20,
  "price": 15,
  "recurring": "one-time",
  "additionalInformation": "Please bring your own yoga mat and water bottle.",
  "picture": "https://example.com/yoga-image.jpg"
}

query.description: Host ID when admin cancels/deletes an activity (disabled)

request.description: Get all activities created by the current host (all statuses).
Get paginated list of members for an activity. Accessible by the activity host or admin.
Get upcoming activities for the current host (date >= today, status = ACTIVE). Sorted by date ascending (earliest first).

Get past/completed activities for the current host. Returns activities with status = COMPLETED or date < today. Includes attendance breakdown, reviews & ratings (including from original activity if re-occurred), and earnings generated. Sorted by date descending (most recent first).

query.description: Host ID when admin cancels/deletes an activity (disabled)

request.description: Cancel an activity. For paid activities: processes partial refund (fee - stripe fee) to all confirmed bookings. For free activities: skips refund process. All members (confirmed and pending) will be notified via email. Activity status will be set to CANCELLED.
Get all pending bookings for the current host.
Get all members (confirmed + pending) for an activity. Returns: activity details, total attendees, confirmed count, pending count, max participants, and list of all members with their booking status.
Get all confirmed bookings for a specific activity (for marking attendance).
Host approves a pending booking. Checks if activity has remaining seats before approving. For paid activities, payment will be captured.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, confirmed, cancelled, or all
Optional: Filter by specific activity ID

request.description: Mark attendance for a booking. attendanceStatus can be 'present' or 'absent'.

query.description: Optional: Filter reviews by activity ID
Optional: Filter broadcasts by activity ID
Price filter: all, free, or paid
Set to true to include member ratings in response
Set to true to include paymentHistory in response

request.description: Get user details by ID. SuperAdmin can view anyone, users can only view themselves.
Update user details. SuperAdmin can update anyone, users can only update themselves.
Delete a user. Admin only.
Create a new user. Admin only.
Suspend or unsuspend a user. Admin only. Request body: { "suspend": true|false, "reason": "optional reason" }
Get comprehensive dashboard statistics for admin overview page. Returns total members, hosts, activities, bookings, revenue, subscriptions, and activity status breakdown.

query.description: Sort by: name, email, created_at, lastLogin
Filter by subscription status: true (active subscription), false (no subscription), or all (default: all)

request.description: Get paginated list of all members (users except admins). Admin only. Filters: search (name/email), sortBy, sortOrder, page, limit, hasSubscription (true/false/all).

query.description: Sort by: name, email, created_at, lastLogin
Filter by subscription status: true (active subscription), false (no subscription), or all (default: all)

request.description: Get paginated list of all creators (users with role = premiumMember or standardMember, subscription true or false). Admin only. Filters: search (name/email), sortBy, sortOrder, page, limit, hasSubscription (true/false/all).

query.description: Search by title, description, location, or host name
Filter by host ID to return activities for a specific host
Filter by time: all, upcoming, past (default: all)
Filter by status: all, active, completed, cancelled (default: all)
Sort by: date, title, price, maxParticipants, created_at (default: date)
Sort order: asc or desc (default: desc - Latest to Oldest)

request.description: Get paginated list of all activities for admin. Admin only. Filters: search (title/description/location/host name), timeFilter (all/upcoming/past), status (all/active/completed/cancelled), sortBy, sortOrder, page, limit. Returns activities with host details, attendance, reviews & ratings, and earnings.

query.description: Search by member name, activity title, or host name
Filter by booking status: pending, confirmed, cancelled
Filter by payment status: pending, paid, refunded, transferred
Filter by member ID to return bookings for a specific member
Filter by attendance status: pending, present, absent
Filter bookings by activity date (from date) - ISO date string
Filter bookings by activity date (to date) - ISO date string
Sort by: created_at, amount, activityDate (default: created_at)
Sort order: asc or desc (default: desc - Latest to Oldest)

request.description: Get paginated list of all bookings for admin. Admin only. Filters: search (member name/activity title/host name), status (pending/confirmed/cancelled), paymentStatus (pending/paid/refunded/transferred), attendanceStatus (pending/present/absent), startDate, endDate (activity date range), sortBy, sortOrder, page, limit. Returns bookings with member, host, and activity details.
Get host earnings summary: total earnings, pending payouts, total paid out, and available balance.
Get host transaction history (bookings that generated earnings) with pagination.

Get withdrawal request preparation data. Returns available balance, list of bank accounts for selection, and whether there's a pending request. Use this before creating a withdrawal request to show bank accounts to the host.

body.description: amount (required): Amount to withdraw (must be less than or equal to available balance). bankAccountId (required): ID of the bank account to use for withdrawal.

request.description: Create a withdrawal request. First call GET /payouts/host/withdrawal-request/prepare to get available balance and bank accounts. Then select a bankAccountId from the list and create the withdrawal request with amount and selected bankAccountId.
Get all withdrawal requests for the current host.
Get payout history for the current host (all withdrawal requests with their status).

body.description: Required: bankName, accountHolderName, swiftCode. Either iban OR accountNumber (at least one required). Optional: routingNumber, address, city, country, postalCode.

request.description: Add a bank account for receiving payouts. Hosts can add multiple bank accounts. Required: bankName, accountHolderName, swiftCode. Either IBAN or Account Number (at least one required). Optional: routingNumber, address, city, country, postalCode.
Get all bank accounts for the current host.
Delete a bank account. Replace :bankAccountId with the bank account ID.

query.description: Filter by status: pending, approved, completed, rejected, failed (optional)

request.description: Get all withdrawal requests. Admin only. Can filter by status. Returns withdrawal requests with host details and bank account information (IBAN, bank name, account holder, etc.).

body.description: screenshot (required): Screenshot URL of the payment proof. reason (optional): Optional reason for approval.

request.description: Approve a withdrawal request. Admin only. Requires screenshot (required) and optional reason. Processes Stripe transfer to host (amount - Stripe fee). Replace :payoutId with the payout ID.

body.description: reason (required): Reason for rejecting the withdrawal request.

request.description: Reject a withdrawal request. Admin only. Requires reason (required). Replace :payoutId with the payout ID.

Create subscription with 3-month free trial. Body: { "plan": "premium" } (default) or { "plan": "standard" }. Premium = full host £5.99/mo; Standard = £1.99/mo, 2 free + 1 paid activity per period.

Response: subscriptionId, invoiceId, clientSecret (often null for trial), status, requiresPaymentMethod, plan.

Get current user's subscription status.

Response: hasSubscription, status, plan (premium | standard), currentPeriodStart, currentPeriodEnd, cancelAtPeriodEnd, isTrialing, trialEnd.

Attach payment method and complete subscription. Use after Create Subscription when requiresPaymentMethod is true (trial) or when confirming payment.

Body: { "paymentMethodId": "pm_xxx" } — from Stripe.js createPaymentMethod (not PaymentIntent id).

Response (trial): { "status": "trialing_activated", "message": "Trial started" } — card saved, no charge; user is host on trial.

Response (invoice paid): { "status": "payment_processing", "invoiceId": "in_xxx" } — webhook will set subscription active.
Optional: confirm payment when clientSecret was returned from Create. May return requires_payment with clientSecret for frontend to confirm.

query.description: Host ID for admin to cancel specific host (disabled)

request.description: Cancel subscription at period end. Works for both active and trialing subscriptions. Hosts can cancel their own; superAdmin can pass hostId to cancel another host's subscription.
